data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of expiration tracking for certifications, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the system checks for expired certifications or that any action is taken when a certification is found to be expired. The linked use case mentions that a medical clearance is valid for one year and that a booking is blocked until renewal, but it does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm that the expiration tracking functionality is implemented and working as required.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system tracks expiration of certifications or takes action when they expire.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add expiration tracking checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system checks for certification expiration and blocks bookings accordingly.
